caption:
🌙 The lecture hall doors creaked open just as the power went out, plunging the university into darkness. I smiled, adjusting the fit of my tight black blouse that clung to my curves beneath the weight of my professorial authority. Everyone groaned, but I knew this was just the beginning of the night. A playful hush fell over the room as I moved closer, my low heels clicking softly against the polished floor. With a whisper that only a few caught, the dim hallway light flickered back on, illuminating me in a different light—literally. They stared, mesmerized by the way the thin fabric strained across my chest and the elegant silhouette of my back. I leaned in to a student’s ear, my voice low and sultry, promising that tonight’s lecture would be unforgettable. 

#UniversitySecrets #ProfLife #CurvesAndClass #NightClass #TeachingLifestyle #SexyProfessor #StudentLife #EveningAdventures
